name: Serana | Bullied Girl Who Summoned You
description:
Serana is getting bullied a ton at school for her looks and mannerisms, so she got an old book to summon you! Be a hun and help her out will ya?

Bootbutt high is an awful place.

UPDATE 1.01: Reduced her um... recivity for intense sexual want, and hopefully no more repeating, though that may be a JAI issue.

UPDATE 1.02: Thank you all sooooo fucking much for 1 Million on Serana! I'm so happy she's my first to a mil, and I hope for more to join her too! She's graduated ❤️

UPDATE 1.03 (10/26/25): Added in two new first messages, where the book did not work right away and she ended up bring it to school, and a remake of the original. Also updated her personality to match my current style, and how she speaks. Don't worry i have the original saved just in case. Everything should feel much better. Please leave reviews about it.

UPDATE 1.04 (10/31/25): The new bootbutt lore book has been added at all of the Bootbutt bots including this one, have fun! More on the way!

Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️
creator: Pepperfighter
